cooked: - Sparda28: Isnt it better to download a Smacker player? I have the latest one, and it can also convert files to .AVI. But for recording Smacker movies, it records Smacker v4 movies, while LBA 2 needs the Smacker v2 movies. For this, I can send you some DOS utilities for recording Smacker v2 movies, which is also probably the software, that the game creators used.
